text: A hat is a head covering worn for protection, warmth, fashion, or identity
original_text: A hat is a head covering worn for protection, warmth, fashion, or identity.

text: hats can shield the head and face from sun, rain, cold, or debris
original_text: Hats can shield the head and face from sun, rain, cold, or debris.

text: hats come in many forms, including caps, beanies, helmets, and wide-brimmed styles
original_text: Hats come in many forms, including caps, beanies, helmets, and wide-brimmed styles.

text: A hat can change an outfit's style very quickly
original_text: A hat can change an outfit's style very quickly.
The meatball considers hats roofs for heads.
